creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text:
Created attachment 215415
Rundeck 3.2.8 Update

3.2.8 release is a small release addressing a few urgent bug fixes.

- Avoiding loading all plugins whenever a method needs to search for a plugin description (bp #6091)
- Fix an issue that caused job execution to get stuck inside a loop when an exception was thrown from a log event call (bp #6050)
- Fix #6065 plugin values should be shown in multivalued list (bp #6066)
